headline: Tyson Foods Faces China Beef Export Halt And Fresh Legal Scrutiny
summary: Chinese customs have suspended export clearances for several U.S. beef plants, including Tyson Foods (NYSE:TSN) facilities, shortly after renewing their licenses. The decision affects Tyson Foods' access to the Chinese beef market at a time when its beef segment is already under pressure. This comes soon after Tyson Foods agreed to a US$48 million settlement in a major pork antitrust lawsuit. Tyson Foods (NYSE:TSN) is a major U.S. protein producer with a significant reliance on beef...
